docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF J & J SHEET METAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAWHIDE BAR   C/O  RAY CHALKER $3,424.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,469.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT RAWHIDE BAR   C/O  RAY CHALKER
